name: synopsis-coverage
question: What fraction of this project's modules conform to the HCT Synopsis discipline?

schema.missing: array of string (module paths without Synopsis section)
schema.over_length: array of string (module paths with Synopsis > 5 non-empty lines)
schema.briefing_summary: string (one-liner suitable for ORACLE BRIEFING display)
schema.briefing: string (alias of briefing_summary; empty when coverage_pct == 100 -> gracefully absent)

fallback: Glob all README.md files and read each to check for a ## Synopsis section -- but you will pay full README ingestion cost across the breadth-first compliance set, which is exactly the cost the verification-oracle category exists to eliminate.
